articles.title: This Expert Suggests How Ripple Price Will Trend Amid Expansion In Europe
articles.description: The long-standing legal battle between Ripple and the SEC in the US has not stopped the firm from advancing into other markets. For example, ripple announced its first On-Demand Liquidity partners (ODL) in France and Sweden via press release. Ripple continues its expansion into the European markets to provide online payment services leveraging its XRP token. In the press release, Ripple...

articles.title: Mango $100M Attack: How a Whale Swindled a Solana DeFi Favorite
articles.description: In something of an audacious move, the attacker used their MNGO tokens to vote on their own Mango DAO governance proposal. Days after BNB Chains bridge was hit by a $566 million exploit, Mango Markets has suffered a nine-figure attack. The Solana DeFi protocol was targeted late Thursday after a whale attacker found a way to profit from manipulating its markets. Mango is a decentralized...

articles.title: Ripple (XRP) Struggles As Bearish Divergence Emerges, Eyes $0.42 Support
articles.description: XRP price slows down after several days as price remains bullish despite showing weakness. XRP trades above 50 and 200-day Exponential Moving Average as price struggles to regain bullish signs with the emergence of bearish divergence. The price of XRP continues to hold strong and could retest $0.42 support. The price of Ripple (XRP) continues to hold strong as the price aims to maintain its...

articles.title: SHIB Army Rejoice: Elon Musk Sells His "Burnt Hair" Perfume for SHIB
articles.description: Elon Musk's first perfume is now sold for crypto, list of coins accepted includes Shiba Inu and DOGE

articles.title: BNB Chain executes hard fork to secure network after $100 million hack
articles.description: BNB Chain has finished a hard fork upgrade called Moran following a large hack last Friday.

articles.title: Solana TVL tanks 23% following $100M Mango Market hack
articles.description: The $100 million exploit of Solana-based decentralized protocol Mango Markets has sent the value of its native token MNGO and that of SOL spiraling down over the last 24 hours.
